name: Idris Muhammad
abstract: Idris Muhammad (Arabic: إدريس محمد; born Leo Morris; November 13, 1939 – July 29, 2014) was an American jazz drummer and bandleader. He had an extensive career performing jazz, funk, R&B, and soul music and recorded with musicians such as Ahmad Jamal, Lou Donaldson, Pharoah Sanders, Bob James, and Tete Montoliu.

concerts.label: Steinway and Sons 150th Anniversary Celebration
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Dawoud Sabu Adeyola
about_quotes.evidence: And Art Farmer lived overseas for a while, Idris Muhammad, and even the old guys, Louis Armstrong, Coleman Hawkins, you know because you know things are just different.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dawoud Sabu Adeyola interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 30, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Stewart
about_quotes.evidence: This is Idris Muhammad playing drums. No I’m sorry, this is not Idris, he’s on a previous album, this is Buddy Williams playing drums
about_quotes.doc_title: Bob Stewart interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 24, 2006

about_quotes.speaker: Albert "June" Gardner
about_quotes.evidence: Idris Muhammad was here at Suno a few weeks ago. He tuned his different. And I was just watching him tune up, you know.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: And this one night I heard at the time his name was… before he changed his name… anyway, he became Idris Muhammad.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Lou Donaldson
about_quotes.evidence: Working with Idris Muhammad put a completely different framework on what you were doing. He’s a great drummer.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lou Donaldson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: David Torkanowsky
about_quotes.evidence: He spent almost every night of his life by a back screen door listening to Idris Muhammad play bebop.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Torkanowsky interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, September 26, 2019
